form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fifth last time out over 710m at this track. Needs to find a bit more to test these.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th over 710m at this track beaten 8 lengths (42.14) behind Soiree in a OPEN on April 9. Thereabouts of late and rates highly this line-up. Expected to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Has been in the money at last four starts, the latest at big odds when second (41.75) at this track. Drawn awkwardly. Top-three aspirations.

form.formComment: Placed last time (41.93) at this track in a OPEN, finishing third and beaten 5 lengths. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed three times. Expected to be in the finish.
